# Virtual environment
venv/
.venv/
env/

# Downloaded datasets (large binary files — regenerated via src/download_data.py)
data/raw/chbmit/*.edf
data/raw/kaggle/*
!data/raw/kaggle/.gitkeep

# Generated results (regenerated by running main.py)
results/*
!results/.gitkeep

# Generated paper (regenerated by running generate_paper.py)
research_paper/*
!research_paper/.gitkeep

# Python cache
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
.Python
*.egg-info/
dist/
build/

# IDE
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo

# OS
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Jupyter
.ipynb_checkpoints/
*.ipynb

# Logs
*.log
